subject: Reasoning & Mental Ability
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match kiya waha answer bhara hai (answer_source dekho).

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph of a boy Suresh said, "he is the son of the only son of my mother." How is Suresh related to that boy?
Amit said, "this girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother". How is Amit related to the girl?
Vikas said - This girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother. How is Vikas related to the girl?
When Nitin saw Varun, he recalled, he is the son of the father of my daughter. Who is Varun?
Pointing to Varman, Madhav said, I am the only son of one of the sons of his father. How is Varman related to Madhav?
A man said to Vansh, your mother's husband is my brother-in-law. How is the man related to Vansh?
A, B and C are sisters. D is the brother of E and E is the daughter of B. How is A related to D?
Dipanshu has a brother Aniket. Dipanshu is the son of Prem. Nitesh is Prem's father. In terms of relationship, what is Aniket of Nitesh?
Reena said, the man going on the road is my mother's husband. How is the man related to Reena?
Pointing to a photograph Lata says, "He is the son of the only son of my grandfather." How is the man in the photograph related to Lata?
Pointing towards a boy Veena said he is the son of only son of my paternal grandfather. How is that boy related to Veena?
Pointing to a photograph. Bajpai said, "He is the son of the only daughter of the father of my brother." How Bajpai is related to the man in the photograph?
If P is the brother of the son of Q's son, how is P related to Q?
Pointing to a woman, Abhijit said, "her granddaughter is the only daughter of my brother." How is the woman related to Abhijit?
Pointing towards Ritka, Nirdosh said, I am the only son of her mother's son. How is Ritka related to Nirdosh?
A girl introduces a boy as the son of the brother of her mother. How is the boy related to the girl?
Pointing to a man in a picture, the girl Aisha said, his mother's only daughter is my mother. How is Aisha related to that man?
Pointing to a lady, Shohbit said, "her granddaughter is the only daughter of my brother." How is the lady related to Shohbit?
Pointing to a girl in a photograph Karina said, "she is the only daughter of my mother's husband." Here Karina is talking about:
Looking at a picture of a boy, Hemant said, "his mother is the wife of my father's son. Brothers and sisters, I have none." At whose picture was Hemant looking?
When Anup saw Sandeep, he recalled, "he is the son of the father of my daughter's mother." Who is Sandeep to Anup?
Pointing to Kalyan, Shreya said, "his mother's brother is the father of my son Manish." How is Kalyan related to Shreya?
Introducing a boy, a girl said, "He is the son of the daughter of the father of my uncle." How is the boy related to the girl?
Deepak said to Nitin, "That boy playing with the football is the younger of the two brothers of the daughter of my father's wife." How is the boy playing football related to Deepak?
Pointing to a lady, Sumit said, "she is the daughter of the only child of my grandmother." How is the lady related to Sumit?
Pointing a photograph X said to his friend Y, "she is the only daughter of the father of my mother." How X is related to the person of photograph?
Introducing Reeta, Sarika said, "she is the only daughter of my father's only daughter." How is Sarika related to Reeta?
Pointing to a photograph Anjali said, "he is the son of the only son of my grandfather." How is the man in the photograph related to Anjali?
Pointing to a boy, a woman said, "his mother is the only daughter of my mother." How is the woman related to the boy?
Pointing to a person, Deepak said, "his only brother is the father of my daughter's father". How is the person related to Deepak?
Introducing a man, a woman said, "he is the only son of the mother of my mother." How is the woman related to the man?
Pointing to a picture, Aamir said, "she is the mother of my Son's wife's daughter". How is Lady related to the Aamir?
If Amitabh says, "Ritik's mother is the only daughter of my mother". How is Amitabh related to Ritik?
Pointing to Gopi, Nalni says, "I am the daughter of the only son of his grandfather." How Nalni is related to Gopi?
Pointing to a girl Sandeep said, "she is the daughter of the only sister of my father." How is Sandeep related to the girl?
Introducing Asha to guests, Bhaskar said, "her father is the only son of my father". How is Asha related to Bhaskar?
Pointing towards a girl, Abhishek says, "this girl is the daughter of only a child of my father." What is the relation of Abhishek's wife to that girl?
Sohan said to Mohan, "this girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother". How is Sohan related to this girl?
S is the mother of T, T is the husband of J, N is the son of J, Z is father-In-law of J, K is the brother of N. How K is related to Z?
Pointing out a man receiving the prize, Malaika said, "he is the brother of my uncle's daughter". Who is the man to Malaika?
Akshay told Vivek, "yesterday I defeated the only brother of the daughter of grandmother". Whom did Akshay Defeat?
Introducing a man, a woman said, "his mother is the only daughter of my father." How is the man related to the woman?
Ashok is the brother of Bani, Bani is the daughter of Chandni and Deepak is the father of Ashok. Then, how is Chandni related to Deepak?
I am the brother of Hemant and Neha is my sister, Mr. Jayant is my father's father. How is Neha related to Mr. Jayant?
Introducing a boy, a girl said, "he is the only son of my mother's mother." How is the girl related to that boy?
Megha and Risha are sisters. Nishant and Harsh are brothers. Megha is the mother of Nishant. How is Risha related to Harsh?
Pointing to a woman, Rohan said, "She is the daughter of the only child of my grandmother". How is the woman related to Rohan?
Pointing to a photograph, Sachin tells his friend, "She is the grand-daughter of the elder brother of my father." How is the girl in the photograph related to Sachin?
A man said to Geeta, "Your mother's husband's sister is my aunt." How is Geeta related to the man?
If Poonam says, "Amit's father Jai is the only son of my father-in-law Sumit", then how is Priya, who is the sister of Amit, related to Poonam?

Pointing to a woman in the picture, Varun said, "Her mother has only one grandchild whose mother is my wife." How is the woman in the picture related to Varun if this woman is the only child of her parents?
Pointing out to Pinki, Simmi said, "She is the only daughter-in-law of the grandmother of my father's only son." How is Pinki related to Simmi?
Pointing to a photograph, Veena tells Karan, "I am the only daughter of this lady and her son is your maternal uncle." How is the speaker related to Karan's father?
Pointing to a person, Tarun said to Garima, "His mother is the only daughter of your father." How is Garima related to the person?

All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
How many male members are there in the family?

All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
How many children does A have?

All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
How is E related to D?

All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
Which of the following is a pair of females?
A and B are brothers, G and H are sisters. A's son is H's brother. How is B related to G?
Pointing towards Harsh, Koyal said, "His mother is the only daughter of my mother." How is Koyal related to Harsh?
Pointing to a lady, a man said, "The son of her only brother is the brother of my wife". How is the lady related to the man?
Pointing to a lady, Abhinav said, "She is the mother of my father's sister". How is that lady related to Abhinav?
If M is the brother of K, D is the daughter of K, N is the sister of M and P is the brother of D, then who is the uncle of P?
lf Tarun says, "Deepak's mother is the only daughter-in-law of my father", then how is Tarun related to Deepak?
Pointing to a man in a photograph, Kunal said, "He is the father of my son's wife's son". How is the man related to Kunal's wife?

In a joint family, there are father, mother, 4 married sons, 2 unmarried sons and three unmarried daughters. Out of the married sons, two have 2 sons each and two have a son and a daughter each. How many male members are there in the family?
Shivam points to a photograph and says, "The woman is my niece's maternal grandmother". How is the woman in the photograph related to Shivam's brother who has no other sibling?
If Karan is the brother of Vijay, Sneha is the daughter of Vijay, Bharti is the sister of Karan and Atul is the brother of Sneha, then how is Karan related to Atul?
Pointing to a woman in a photograph, Kartik said, "She is the mother of the only daughter of my son". How is Kartik related to the woman in the photograph?
Introducing Aman, Kritika says, "His daughter's mother is the only daughter of my father's wife". How is Kritika related to Aman?
P is brother of Q, R is mother of P, S is father of R. How is S related to Q?
A is brother of B. C is daughter of A. D is son of B. How are C and D related?

If D is the brother of B, then how is B related to C?
To answer this question which of the following statement(s) is/are necessary?
The son of D is the grandson of C.
B is the sister of D.

Neeta who is the sister-in-law of Anshu, is the daughter-in-law of Riya. Neeraj is the father of Abhishek who is the only brother of Anshu. How is Neeta related to Abhishek if Neeraj and Riya are a married couple?
Introducing a woman, Sohan said, She is the mother of the only daughter of my son. How that woman is related to Sohan?
A is son of B. C is wife of A. D is daughter of C. What is D of B?
Pointing to Gauri a person said, The son of her only brother is the brother of my wife. How is Gauri related to the person?

Read the information given below and answer the question that follow:
A, B, C, D, E and F are six members of a family.
One couple has parents and their children in the family.
A is the son of C and E is the daughter of A.
D is the daughter of F who is the mother of E.
Who are the male members in the family?

Read the information given below and answer the question that follow:
A, B, C, D, E and F are six members of a family.
One couple has parents and their children in the family.
A is the son of C and E is the daughter of A.
D is the daughter of F who is the mother of E.
Which of the following pairs is the parents of the children E and D?

Read the information given below and answer the question that follow:
A, B, C, D, E and F are six members of a family.
One couple has parents and their children in the family.
A is the son of C and E is the daughter of A.
D is the daughter of F who is the mother of E.
Which of the following pairs is the parents of the couple?
A is the mother of B; B is the sister of D; D is the father of M. How is A related to M?
If P is the brother of Q; Q is the sister of R; and R is the father of S, then how is S related to P?

A and B are children of D. Who is the father of A?
To answer this question which of the following statements is/are necessary?
C is the brother of A and the son of E.
F is the mother of B.
A's son B is married to C whose sister D is married with E, the brother of B. How is D related to A?

A photograph shows Mr. P, Mr. Q, Mrs. R and Mrs. S.
Mrs. R and Mrs. S are sisters. Mr. P is husband of Mrs. R and Mr. Q is husband of Mrs. S. What is Mr. P of Mr. Q?

Study the following information carefully and answer the question.
Five persons Supriya, Nikhil, Avnish, Nipun and Sunita are sitting around a dining table.
Supriya is the mother of Avnish, who is the husband of Sunita.
Nipun is the brother of Supriya.
Nikhil is the husband of Supriya.
How is Nikhil related to Sunita?
Deepanshu is father-in-law of Aanya who is the sister-in-law of Nitin. Savita is mother of Jitu who is the only brother of Nitin. How is Aanya related to Jitu?
Pointing towards Abhinav, Karan said to Aarti, His mother is the only daughter of your father. How is Aarti related to Abhinav?
P is father-in-law of Q who is the wife of T. S is mother of T who is the only brother of R. How is R related to P?
Pointing towards a woman, Mitakshi said, Her sister is my daughter's brother's mother. How is the woman related to Mitakshi?
Kirti is the daughter of Smriti. Amit is the son of Smriti's brother Sahil. Smriti is the mother of Nisha. How is Kirti related to Nisha?
Priya is the mother of Vishal, who is the husband of Sonika. Nishant is the brother of Priya. Nikhil is the husband of Priya. How is Sonika related to Nikhil?
Pointing towards a man, Ankita said, He is the father of the son of my brother's only sister. How is the man related to Ankita?
P is Y's brother. Y is Q's father. Q and X are sisters. How is X related to P?
A is the brother of B. B is the wife of C. C is the son of P. P is the wife of Q. What is Q of B?
P is Q's brother, X is P's mother, Y is X's father, Z is Q's son. How is Z related to P?
P and Q are sisters. P is the mother of R. Q's daughter S is married with T. X is the husband of P. How is Q related toT?
A is the son of C; C and Q are sisters; Z is the mother of Q and P is the son of Z. Which of the following statements is true?

options.label: C
options.text: P is the maternal uncle of A

options.label: D
options.text: Q is the maternal grandfather of A

questions.question_text: Ravi introduces Raman as the son of the brother of his father's wife. How is Raman related to Ravi?
M is the father of O and P is the son of Q. N is the brother of M. If O is the sister of P, how is N related to Q?
Sahil said to a lady sitting in a car, The only daughter of the mother of my wife is the sister-in-law of the brother of your sister. How is the husband of the lady related to Sahil?
Pointing to a photograph, Rahul said, She is the daughter of my grandfather's only son. How is Rahul related to the girl in the photograph?
If P + Q means P is the brother of Q; P {tex}\times{/tex} Q means P is the father of Q and P - Q means P is the sister of Q, then which of the following relations shows that I is the niece of K?

Read the following statements carefully:
A3B means A is the wife of B.
A4B means A is the brother of B.
A5B means A is the father of B.
A9B means A is the sister of B.
Which of the following means F is the mother of K?

Answer the question based on the following information:
A + B means A is the mother of B.
A - B means A is the sister of B.
A * B means A is the father of B.
A {tex}\pi{/tex} B means A is the brother of B.
Which of the following means Q is the grandfather of P?

Answer the question based on the following information:
A + B means A is the mother of B.
A - B means A is the sister of B.
A * B means A is the father of B.
A {tex}\pi{/tex} B means A is the brother of B.
Which of the following means that N is the maternal uncle of M?
Introducing a man, a woman says, His wife is the only daughter of my father. How is the man related to the woman?
If P Q means P is the father of Q, P # Q means P is the mother of Q and P * Q means P is the sister of Q, then N # L $ P * Q shows Q is ________ of N.

If A {tex}\times{/tex} B means that A is the sister of B, A {tex}\div{/tex} B means that A is the daughter of B, A - B means that A is the son of B, then how is P related to S in relationship P - Q {tex}\times{/tex} R {tex}\div{/tex} S?

A family consists of five members B, C, E, F and G. C is the son of G but G is not the mother of C. E and G are married couple. B is the brother of G. F is the daughter of E. Who is the brother-in-law of E?

If P + Q means P is the mother of Q, P {tex}\div{/tex} Q means P is the brother of Q, P # Q means P is the father of Q and P * Q means P is the sister of Q, then how is L related to O in K {tex}\div{/tex} L + M # N * O?
Pointing to Aanya, Rohit says, She is the only daughter of my father's mother-in-law. How is Aanya related to Rohit?
Saksham is the nephew of Karan. Karan's father is Ajay. Sadhna is Ajay's mother. Sadhna's husband is Atul. Ankita is the mother-in-law of Atul. How is Karan related to Atul?
If A # B means B is father of A, A * B means B is mother of A, A £ B means B is brother of A and A $ B means B is sister of A, then which of the following means O is grandmother of T?
If X - Y means X is the brother of Y, X + Y means X is the mother of Y, X {tex}\div{/tex} Y means X is the daughter of Y, then who is the father of B in A + B - C {tex}\div{/tex} D?
Pointing to a man in a photograph, a woman said, The father of his brother is the only son of my grandfather. How is the woman related to the man in the photograph?
